evals.name: docs_clarity_smoke
evals.prompt: Rewrite this README section so a new engineer can follow it on the first read. The current version is bloated and vague.
evals.expected_output: Routes to first-principles clarity and the revision pass stack, then favors a technical-doc shape rather than a general essay voice.

assertions.text: Uses references/genre-modes.md to keep the output in a documentation shape

evals.name: stiff_memo_edge
evals.prompt: This memo is clear enough but still sounds stiff, corporate, and too polished. Make it feel more owned.
evals.expected_output: Routes to cadence, ownership, and genericity cleanup rather than only grammar rules.

evals.name: style_bundle_calibration
evals.prompt: Turn this technical walkthrough into something with more Simon Willison or Julia Evans energy, but keep the commands exact.
evals.expected_output: Routes to the technical teacher style bundle and the correct genre mode without turning the piece into imitation or loose personal essay.

assertions.text: Keeps the piece in a technical guide mode

evals.name: negative_non_writing_prompt
evals.prompt: Fix this failing React hydration test and tell me why the state mismatches on the client.
evals.expected_output: Does not treat a code-debugging request as a writing problem.

assertions.text: Does not route a code-only debugging prompt through the writing references

evals.name: essay_shape_disclosure
evals.prompt: This reflective essay probably wants a braided structure and a less tidy ending.
evals.expected_output: Routes to essay-appropriate shape and style guidance rather than documentation or copywriting guidance.

assertions.text: Loads references/style-bundles.md for essay and reflection calibration
